title: pouzolzia zeylanica var. microphylla
intro: Pouzolzia zeylanica var. microphylla, also known as the small-leaved Pouzolzia, is a plant species that belongs to the nettle family (Urticaceae) and is native to Sri Lanka. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The plant's leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine to alleviate conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as to promote overall health and well-being. Pouzolzia zeylanica var. microphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
